settings_hub.title: Settings
settings_hub.subtitle: Configure providers, actions, and preferences
actions.no_providers_desc: Configure at least one API key in Provider Settings to assign a model to this shortcut.
dashboard.title: Dashboard
actions.title: Actions
actions.subtitle: Voice and text transformation features
actions.grammar_desc: Fix grammar and spelling in selected text
actions.translate_desc: Translate selected text to preferred language
actions.improve_desc: Improve selected text with your personal AI agent
actions.screen_question_desc: Ask AI about what's on your screen (requires vision-capable provider)
dictation_settings.title: Dictation Settings
dictation_settings.subtitle: Configure voice recognition and transcription
dictation_settings.field_names_hint: Comma-separated names that may be mentioned
dictation_settings.field_names_placehold: e.g., Dr. Smith, TechCorp, Project Alpha
dictation_settings.vocab_description: Add technical terms, brand names, and jargon for better recognition.
dictation_settings.languages_description: Select languages you speak. This helps improve transcription accuracy.
engine.soniox_desc: Best quality and language coverage. Requires internet and a Soniox API key.
engine.soniox_privacy: Audio is uploaded to Soniox for transcription.
engine.local_windows_desc: Works offline. Audio never leaves your machine. Free to use.
engine.local_windows_privacy: Audio stays entirely on your device. Nothing is uploaded.
engine.local_macos_privacy: Audio stays entirely on your device.
engine.not_configured_hint: API key required to use this engine.
engine.download_size_info: This will download ~700 MB. The model is stored locally and allows offline dictation.
engine.attribution: Speech recognition powered by NVIDIA Parakeet TDT (CC-BY-4.0)
onboarding.llm_step_subtitle: Enter API keys for the providers you want to use. Keys are stored locally and never leave your device.
onboarding.stt_step_subtitle: How should ShortCut transcribe your voice?
onboarding.stt_key_hint: Enter your Soniox API key here if you want to use cloud transcription.
onboarding.stt_key_required: Enter a Soniox API key to continue with cloud transcription.
onboarding.download_required: Download the speech model to continue with local transcription.
onboarding.complete_subtitle: Use the keyboard shortcuts to start using ShortCut.
onboarding.local_desc: Works offline. Audio never leaves your machine. Free to use. One-time ~700 MB download.
onboarding.local_coming_soon: Coming in a future update for macOS.
providers.openai_desc: Best general performance. Requires an OpenAI API key.
providers.anthropic_desc: Excellent for reasoning and writing. Requires an Anthropic API key.
providers.gemini_desc: Fast and capable. Requires a Google Gemini API key.
providers.grok_desc: Grok by xAI. Requires an xAI API key.
providers.ollama_desc: Run AI locally. Requires Ollama running at the configured URL.
providers.soniox_desc: High-quality cloud transcription. Requires a Soniox API key.
shortcuts.title: Keyboard Shortcuts
shortcuts.subtitle: Customize global hotkeys
shortcuts.list_edit_hint: Click a shortcut to customize it
settings.title: Provider and model configuration
settings.subtitle: Configure AI provider keys and preferences
settings.info_prefix: Looking for language and microphone settings?
settings.setup_intro: Enter API keys for the providers you want to use.
settings.setup_item_key: API keys are stored locally and never leave your device
settings.providers_desc: Enter API keys for the providers you want to use. Keys are stored locally.
settings.task_assignments_desc: Choose which provider and model to use for each AI task.
settings.task_screen_question_hint: Select a vision-capable model from the chosen provider.
settings.task_dictation_hint: Configured on the Dictation Settings page
settings.task_assignments_empty_desc: Add at least one API key above to assign models to your shortcuts.
app_settings.title: App Settings
app_settings.subtitle: Customize appearance and preferences
app_settings.debug_description: Surface Debug Logs in the Settings page
improve_settings.title: Improve Settings
improve_settings.subtitle: Configure how your text is improved
improve_settings.system_prompt_descripti: Optional instructions sent as a system message that shape the model's persona and writing style. Leave empty to skip the system message.
improve_settings.field_system_prompt_hin: Describe the desired voice, tone, or constraints. No placeholders needed.
improve_settings.prompt_description: This prompt is sent to your configured AI provider along with the selected text. Customize it to get improvements that match your style.
improve_settings.field_prompt_hint: Use {text} as a placeholder for the selected text
improve_settings.provider_description: Pick which AI provider and model handle the Improve action.
improve_settings.info_description: The Improve action sends your text to the AI provider configured in Settings.
improve_settings.info_placeholder: {text} in the prompt is replaced with your selected text
improve_settings.info_provider: The provider and model used are configured in Settings → Task Assignments
grammar_settings.title: Grammar Settings
grammar_settings.subtitle: Configure how your text is corrected
grammar_settings.system_prompt_descripti: Optional instructions sent as a system message that shape the model's behavior while fixing grammar. Leave empty to skip the system message.
grammar_settings.field_system_prompt_hin: Describe the desired voice, tone, or constraints. No placeholders needed.
grammar_settings.prompt_description: This prompt is sent to your configured AI provider along with the selected text. Customize it to fix grammar the way you want.
grammar_settings.field_prompt_hint: Use {text} as a placeholder for the selected text
grammar_settings.provider_description: Pick which AI provider and model handle the Grammar Fix action.
grammar_settings.info_description: The Grammar Fix action sends your text to the AI provider configured for this action.
grammar_settings.info_placeholder: {text} in the prompt is replaced with your selected text
grammar_settings.info_provider: Changing the provider or model here also updates Settings → Task Assignments
translate_settings.title: Translate Settings
translate_settings.subtitle: Configure how your text is translated
translate_settings.system_prompt_descrip: Optional instructions sent as a system message that shape the model's behavior while translating. Leave empty to skip the system message.
translate_settings.field_system_prompt_h: Describe the desired voice, tone, or constraints. No placeholders needed.
translate_settings.prompt_description: This prompt is sent to your configured AI provider along with the selected text.
translate_settings.provider_description: Pick which AI provider and model handle the Translate action.
translate_settings.info_description: The Translate action sends your text to the AI provider configured for this action.
translate_settings.info_placeholder: {text} in the prompt is replaced at runtime
translate_settings.info_provider: Changing the provider or model here also updates Settings → Task Assignments
screen_question_settings.title: Screen Question Settings
screen_question_settings.subtitle: Configure how the AI answers questions about your screen
screen_question_settings.system_prompt_d: Optional instructions sent as a system message that shape how the model interprets the screen capture. Leave empty to skip the system message.
screen_question_settings.field_system_pr: Describe the desired voice, tone, or constraints. No placeholders needed.
screen_question_settings.provider_descri: Pick which AI provider and model handle the Screen Question action. Only vision-capable models are listed.
screen_question_settings.task_hint: Only vision-capable models from the selected provider are shown.
screen_question_settings.info_descriptio: The Screen Question action captures your screen and sends it with your question to a vision-capable model.
screen_question_settings.info_vision: Only vision-capable models are available for this action — other models are filtered out automatically.
screen_question_settings.info_provider: Changing the provider or model here also updates Settings → Task Assignments
history.title: History
history.clear_confirm: Clear all history? This cannot be undone.
history.empty_description: Your dictation transcriptions will appear here.
debug.title: Debug Logs
debug.subtitle: View application logs for troubleshooting
debug.empty_hint: Logs will appear here as you use the app
debug.footer_hint: Logs are stored in memory only and cleared on app restart
mic.label: Microphone
mic.permission_required: Microphone access is required for voice dictation.
mic.permission_denied: Microphone access denied. Check your system privacy settings.
mic.no_microphones: No microphones found. Please connect a microphone.
screen_question.permission_denied_macos: Screen Recording permission is required. Open System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording and enable ShortCut.
